description_long: This is a large, rectangular above-ground jacuzzi with a wooden exterior paneling and a bright blue water interior. The jacuzzi features a sturdy frame with visible support brackets along the base, and a set of metal handrails and a wooden ladder at one end for easy entry. On the opposite end, there are two orange filtration or pump units attached externally, likely for water circulation and cleaning. The water inside appears clean and nearly fills the tub to the brim, giving a sense of readiness for use. The structure is robust and designed for multiple users, suitable for placement in urban parks, backyards, or recreational areas. No visible jets or control panels are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A large, rectangular above-ground jacuzzi with wooden paneling, blue water, a front ladder, and external filtration units. The tub is nearly full and designed for group use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden ladder and metal handrails for entry, with clear blue water visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long wooden paneling and the absence of entry features or filtration units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two orange filtration or pump units attached to the exterior and the water surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with a clear view of the wooden paneling and no entry or filtration features.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
